## Overview

A static IORegistryPlane representing the new IOAudioPlane that the IOAudioFamily uses to represent the signal chain of the device.

# gIOAudioPlane

## Declaration

```swift
static const IORegistryPlane *gIOAudioPlane;
```

## Overview

A static IORegistryPlane representing the new IOAudioPlane that the IOAudioFamily uses to represent the signal chain of the device.
title: gIOAudioPlane
